page_content:
EDCP665 Family and Social Support Systems (3 Credits)

Principles and methods useful for understanding the role of family support systems in counseling. Specialized skills for counseling impaired adults and their families.

Recommended: EDCP610.

EDCP668 Special Topics in Rehabilitation (1-6 Credits) Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

EDCP669 Professional Issues in Counseling Psychology (1 Credit) Introduction to counseling psychology, including history and development of the field, and current professional and scientific issues. Exploration of career, research, and professional development opportunities. Prerequisite: Must be in the Counseling Psychology program. Cross-listed with: PSYC669.

Repeatable to: 3 credits if content differs.
